the email to the client with the corresponding .zip file.
The XML document is created.
The DIAN tab then displays the following:
Signed Date: timestamp recorded of the XML creation.
Status: Status result obtained in the  response.
Testing Environment: To know if the document sent was delivered to the  testing environment.
Certification Process: To know if the document was sent as part of the certification process with the .
Download: To download the sent XML file, even if the  result was rejected.
Fetch Attached Document: To download the generated attached document file included in the delivered .zip file to the client.
